notes: Off-season homepage (modified 2026-05-11). The 'HAPPENINGS' sidebar lists ~5 ticketed events as buttons linking to penningsfarm.ticketspice.com, but the homepage itself surfaces only the event titles and slugs — no explicit dates appear in the HTML (dates live on the linked TicketSpice pages). One generic recurring program is mentioned ('live music every weekend'). All other content is marketing copy, hours, or category descriptions and was excluded. Note: substituted for the original Pennings Farm Cidery target since the cidery domain is now parked.
